title: sphenogyne chamaemeloides
intro: Sphenogyne chamaemeloides, also known as the small-leaved sphenogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sphenogyne chamaemeloides are said to include relief from digestive issues and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Sphenogyne chamaemeloides are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
